variants.title: Fleetguard FF5616 Fuel Filter, Spin-On | Replaces the Donaldson P170047
variants.description: Fleetguard® FF5616 spin-on fuel filter delivers superior performance using proven media technology, removing harmful contaminants. Fleetguard fuel filters ensure optimal fuel system protection to meet or exceed OEM specifications.

variants.title: Donaldson P170047 Fuel Spin-On
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P170047 Fuel Spin-On is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
